source: The Forever Winter shipping game files (build 24045295) — RandomContainerLootData + DT_GachaLootTable + BP_RareLootManager, decoded with CUE4Parse.
generated_note: Source-first loot index. Rarity is each item's share of that source's loot pool by weight (relative scarcity within one open) — not a per-raid probability. Only named loot items are shown; ammo & weapon mods live on their own tabs.
